title: Saro´s Money
description: Adds physical coins (1€–2€), banknotes (5€–500€), ATMs, and bank accounts for a complete multiplayer economy — with /pay, /eco commands, sign shops, and a leaderboard.
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Money_Mod/BH_SM_Header.webp)

![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Money_Mod/BH_SM_Overview.webp)

Saro's Money adds a full physical economy to Minecraft: coins (1¢–2€), banknotes (5€–500€), colored wallets, ATMs, and persistent bank accounts that survive death and are safe from theft. Run an economy on your server with /money, /pay, and admin /eco commands — plus sign-based buy/sell shops and a money leaderboard. Supports Forge, Fabric, NeoForge, and Quilt for Minecraft 1.12.2 through 1.21.+.

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Money_Mod/BH_SM_Features.webp)

- **Currency Items** 💵
  - **Coins** 🪙
  - **Banknotes** 💳
  - **Wallet** 👜 to carry money

- **Multiplayer and Survival Compatible** 🌐
  - Enjoy seamless integration in both multiplayer and survival environments.

- **Multilingual Support** 🌍
  - Available in English, German, and Polish.

- **Banking System** 🏦
  - Includes money and an ATM with a bank account system.
  - **3 visually distinct ATMs** 🏧 for variety.

- **Commands** ⚙️
  - Use `/pay <playername> <amount>`to pay other users money.
  - Manage accounts with `/eco add:take:set:get <playername> <value>`.
  - Create a leaderboard on the map with `/leaderboard create:delete <places>`

- **Future Enhancements** 🔜
  - Stay tuned for more exciting features coming soon!

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Money_Mod/BH_SM_SupportedVersions.webp)

### Currently Supported

- **Forge 1.21.6** ✅

- **Forge 1.21.3** ✅
- **Forge 1.21.1** ✅
- **Forge 1.21** ✅
- **Forge 1.20.6** ✅
- **Forge 1.20.4** ✅
- **Fabric 1.20.1** ✅
- **Forge 1.20.1** ✅
- **Forge 1.19.4** ✅

### Discontinued
- **Fabric/Quilt 1.19.2** ❌
- **Forge 1.12.2** ❌

![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Money_Mod/BH_SM_Community.webp)

Connect with us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and be part of the Saro's Mod community!


[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Money_Modern/BH_SMTP_PromoCard.webp)](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php)

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
